perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a man in a light grey hoodie (Cai Aga) talking directly to the camera in a room with a light blue curtain and a wooden shelf. (2) Cartoon avatars of two other men appear as he mentions them. (3) He is then joined by a woman in a red hoodie (Er Gu) sitting on an orange leather sofa; they talk and he suddenly screams with excitement while clenching his fists. (4) The scene shifts to a medical clinic environment where several people are gathered, including a doctor in green scrubs and a patterned surgical cap. (5) A close-up shows a small clear plastic container being held, containing a small piece of tissue, identified by text as a segment of the vas deferens. (6) In the clinic's consultation area, the man in the grey hoodie talks with the doctor and another staff member while Er Gu observes and laughs. (7) Finally, the man and woman are back in a home/studio setting, wearing different clothes (man in a black and grey polo, woman in a black hoodie), summarizing their experience and laughing.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, energetic male voice speaking rapidly in Mandarin over a light, upbeat, and quirky background music track. (2) A female voice joins in, speaking in a friendly and conversational tone. (3) There is a sudden, loud, and exaggerated scream of joy from the male speaker. (4) The soundscape shifts to include ambient chatter and professional yet casual dialogue within a clinic setting, with the doctor's voice being clear and steady. (5) Occasional sound effects like 'dings' and 'pops' are used to emphasize text or transitions. (6) The video concludes with the return of the upbeat BGM as the couple summarizes the experience with laughter and high energy.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the spoken Mandarin throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'hahababy 旗下' (under hahababy), '小小員工' (small employees), '團結力量大' (Unity is strength), '結紮啦!!!' (Vasectomy!!!), '我們手術室太小 下次找100坪的' (Our OR is too small, next time we'll find a 300sqm one - humorous), '輸精管' (Vas deferens), '好短喔!!' (So short!!), '秘密會客室' (Secret meeting room), '津久帥醫師' (Handsome doctor of Tsuku).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Decision -> Clinic Visit/Procedure Reveal -> Post-op Review/Recommendation.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 main female creator, 1 male doctor, 1 female staff member, 2 other individuals visible in clinic background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man (Cai Aga) with brown hair wearing a grey hoodie and later a color-blocked polo; a woman (Er Gu) with hair in buns wearing a red hoodie and later a black hoodie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A studio/living room with a blue curtain, wooden shelves, and an orange sofa; a modern medical clinic with white walls, medical equipment, and consultation desks.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting and clinical fluorescent lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Preparation -> Climax (Procedure Evidence) -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document the creator's personal experience of undergoing a vasectomy and to promote the specific clinic where it was performed in a humorous and relatable way to reduce stigma or fear associated with the procedure.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names and shows the logo of 'Tsuku Clinic' and the creators recommend the doctor and the experience.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Cai Aga's high-energy speaking style and exaggerated facial expressions; variety-show style text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a mix of personal vlog style and promotional content for medical services.
